Creator Payouts

Connect Stripe to receive tips on your drops. 0% platform cut — the full amount (minus Stripe's ~3% processing) goes to you.

Connect Stripe →

Sign in first. Once connected, Stripe handles KYC, tax forms, and bank linkage. Refunds and tax 1099s come through your Stripe dashboard.

Per ADR-053: tip jars ship in v1; paid drops + royalty payouts ship in v1.1.
